case_title: GOLDENBERG VADIM VS BRAKE & WHEEL SERVICE CENTER

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO BRAKE & WHEEL SERVICE CENTER RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDENBERG VADIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAKE & WHEEL SERVICE CENTER $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,021.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDENBERG VADIM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRAKE & WHEEL SERVICE CENTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
